note: measures ResidentWorkspace.CheckOverlay (the S1 speculative typecheck) and GetDiagnostics+DiagnosticDelta (the S2 delta mode), the operations fuse_check invokes when a resident workspace is live; timings are environment-dependent; runs in a dedicated process that never invokes MSBuildWorkspace.
